pricing.title: Claims-first membership
pricing.subtitle: Start with vehicle, property, and injury matters. Guidance-only cases stay advisory, and out-of-scope matters are referred out.

scope.title: What we handle now, what stays guidance, and what we refer out
scope.subtitle: Interdomestik launches with a claims-first contract. These boundaries show where Free Start and membership can help, where staff-led recovery can begin, and where we only route you to the right next step.

launch.title: Handled now
launch.description: These claim types fit the launch recovery path when there is a plausible monetary outcome.
items: Personal injury claims with a monetary recovery path
launch.note: Free Start can prepare the pack. Membership adds human triage and document review before any accepted escalation.

guidance.title: Guidance only
guidance.description: These categories can still receive guidance or document review, but they do not enter success-fee recovery at launch.
items: Landlord disputes without a direct monetary recovery path
Wage withholding or employment disputes without a clear payout path
Repair enforcement or contract termination disputes without a direct payout
Broader consumer complaints outside the launch claim types
guidance.note: We keep these matters advisory and refer onward when a partner route makes more sense.

outOfScope.title: Out of scope
outOfScope.description: These matters are not part of the launch contract and are not accepted for staff handling.
items: General business disputes outside defined group packages
outOfScope.note: We do not imply coverage here. Where possible, we route you to a more suitable external provider.

boundary.title: Referral boundaries
boundary.body: Partner referral and legal routes begin only after scope review. Staff-led escalation is available only for accepted recovery matters; everything else remains self-serve guidance, membership guidance, or a referral.
items: External legal partner action requires a separate written opt-in after case acceptance.
Flight delay compensation stays outside the current launch path and returns in a later phase.

freeStart.title: Free Start is informational only
freeStart.body: Free Start gives you informational guidance, templates, and next-step tools. It does not start human review, legal advice, or staff-led recovery.

hotline.title: Hotline means routing and support
hotline.body: The hotline is for urgent routing, support, and next-step guidance. It does not mean immediate legal review, claim acceptance, or staff-led handling.

meta.title: Membership Plans - Interdomestik
meta.description: Membership for vehicle, property, and injury claims with explicit guidance-only and referral boundaries.
